channel.title: Journal of Applied Geodesy
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Applied Geodesy

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Ram Kumar Vankadara, Aramesh Seif, Sampad Kumar Panda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jag-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Advancing polar motion prediction with derivative information
item.description: Article by Ram Kumar Vankadara, Aramesh Seif, Sampad Kumar Panda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jag-2024-0046

item.title: Analyses of data from the first Chinese seismo electromagnetic satellite (CSES-01) together with other earthquake precursors associated with the Turkey earthquakes (February 6, 2023)
item.description: Article by Ram Kumar Vankadara, Aramesh Seif, Sampad Kumar Panda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jag-2024-0024

item.title: Regional evaluation of global geopotential models and three types of digital elevation models with ground-based gravity and GNSS/levelling data using several techniques over Sudan
item.description: Article by Ram Kumar Vankadara, Aramesh Seif, Sampad Kumar Panda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jag-2024-0006

item.title: Correlation between rate of TEC index and positioning error during solar flares and geomagnetic storms using navigation with Indian constellation receiver measurements
item.description: Article by Ram Kumar Vankadara, Aramesh Seif, Sampad Kumar Panda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jag-2024-0022

item.title: Analyzing recent deformation in Wadi Hagul, Eastern Desert, Egypt, via advanced remote sensing and geodetic data processing
item.description: Article by Ram Kumar Vankadara, Aramesh Seif, Sampad Kumar Panda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jag-2024-0039

item.title: Monitoring of a rockfill embankment dam using TLS and sUAS point clouds
item.description: Article by Ram Kumar Vankadara, Aramesh Seif, Sampad Kumar Panda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jag-2023-0038

item.title: The Modified Ambiguity Function Approach with regularization for instantaneous precise GNSS positioning
item.description: Article by Ram Kumar Vankadara, Aramesh Seif, Sampad Kumar Panda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jag-2024-0007

item.title: A new challenge for cadastral surveying in Taiwan: feasibility analysis using combination on CORS data and online PPP service
item.description: Article by Ram Kumar Vankadara, Aramesh Seif, Sampad Kumar Panda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jag-2024-0036

item.title: Occurrence characteristics of ionospheric scintillations in the civilian GPS signals (L1, L2, and L5) through a dedicated scintillation monitoring receiver at a low-latitude location in India during the 25th solar cycle
item.description: Article by Ram Kumar Vankadara, Aramesh Seif, Sampad Kumar Panda DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jag-2024-0041
